#### models.rb — Dog(class), speak(method), initialize(method), create(method), Animal(class), +4 more

```ruby
1	# Domain models for the rb-small fixture.
2	
3	DEFAULT_SOUND = "..."
4	
5	module Walkable
6	  def walk
7	    "walking"
8	  end
9	end
10	
11	module Animals
12	  class Animal
13	    attr_reader :name
14	
15	    def initialize(name)
16	      @name = name
17	    end
18

20	      DEFAULT_SOUND
21	    end
22	  end
23	
24	  class Dog < Animal
25	    include Walkable
26	
27	    attr_accessor :breed
28

30	      super(name)
31	      @breed = breed
32	      @legs = 4
33	    end
34

37	    end
38

40	      Dog.new(name, "mutt")
41	    end
```

#### service.rb — make_dog(function), describe(function), MAX_DOGS(constant), d(variable), sound(variable)

```ruby
1	# Service layer exercising require_relative + inferred instance-method calls.
2	
3	require_relative 'models'
4	
5	MAX_DOGS = 10
6	
7	def make_dog(name)
8	  Dog.new(name, "lab")
9	end
10	
11	def describe(name)
12	  d = Dog.new(name, "lab")
13	  sound = d.speak
14	  d.breed
15	  sound
16	end
```
